name: pr-corpus learning event writes one entry to the merkle-chained audit log per promoted pattern
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '[{"id":"p-test","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --audit-log compliance/audit.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"pr-corpus-learn"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p-test"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
